name: Hot & Sour Soup 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the seaweed, wood ears, and bean curd for 30 seconds in a kettle of boiling water. Drain.
2. Mix the pork loin with 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1/4 tablespoon cornstarch, and 1/3 teaspoon sesame oil.
3. Heat 6 cups water, salt, and sugar to boiling in another kettle.
4. Add the seaweed, wood ears, and bean curd to the boiling soup.
5. When the water returns to a boil, add the pork loin.
6. In a bowl, mix the remaining soy sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, pepper, coriander, scallions, and ginger root.
7. Dissolve the remaining cornstarch in 2 cups of water.
8. Add the mixed herbs and spices to the soup.
9. Turn off the heat.
10. Add beaten egg to the soup in a thin stream while stirring continuously.
11. Stir in the herb mixture.
12. Ladle the soup into bowls and serve hot.
